/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_hash_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_wal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_kv_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_lru.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_concurrency.cpp.o -o run_tests  libkv_store_lib.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
